sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43827" key="eu)epith/deuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐεπι-τήδευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n43827.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">act embodying good conduct</tr_>, cj. in Stoic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.11e</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
